parameters.query: SELECT ac.nom, ac.complexity, t.nom_entreprise AS client_name FROM automation_catalog ac, tenants t WHERE ac.id = '{{ $json.automationId }}'::uuid AND ac.is_active = true AND t.id = '{{ $json.tenantId }}'::uuid

INSERT INTO automation_purchases (tenant_id, automation_id, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('{{ $('02. Valider').first().json.tenantId }}'::uuid, '{{ $('02. Valider').first().json.automationId }}'::uuid, 'en_attente', NOW(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, automation_id) DO UPDATE SET status = 'en_attente', updated_at = NOW() RETURNING id
